case_id: # tests/integration/matrix/flags.tsv - Flag matrix source of truth.
#   $NET      a unique private network name (only created when referenced)
# backend_scope: all | docker_family | apple | docker | orbstack | colima | podman
#                | comma-list. expected_exit: 0 = success, non-zero = expected fail.
# assertions: ;-separated substrings that must appear in combined output;
#             prefix with ! to assert absence. Empty = exit-code-only.
# `logs --follow`, rebuild-image, install) live in cases/*.sh (the coverage
# guard scans BOTH this file and cases/*.sh). --save-team / --save-user are
# deferred to phase 2 (DCE_CONFIG_ROOT isolation); see cases/flag-coverage.sh.
# --- dce new --sync / --sync-ignore (fail-fast paths; positive path needs
#     mutagen and is covered by tests/contract/sync-lifecycle.sh) ---
# --- dce logs (follow modes covered in cases/lifecycle.sh with a timeout) ---
# --- dce exec (--root MUST precede the project name: dce exec [--root] <name> <cmd>) ---
# --- dce clean (dry-run variants + mutually-exclusive expected failure) ---
# --- dce config (show/get/set/ls + sync-vscode incl. backend restriction) ---
